Subject Line: Re: ADP
emailHTML: Luis Muñoz Altamirano from QuantumHR has sent an email to Evan Cravener regarding a price lock agreement that is set to last for 36 months. Luis requests several modifications to the agreement to align with their long-term financial planning. Specifically, he asks for a cap on excluded fees such as delivery and maintenance, which are not covered under the current price lock, to prevent unexpected cost increases. He also seeks confirmation on the option to renew the price lock at the same rate after its expiration on January 1, 2028, as discussed in a previous phone call. Additionally, Luis proposes a reduction or flexibility in the early termination fee, suggesting a penalty of one month of fees or a prorated fee based on the remaining contract time. He emphasizes that these adjustments would enhance financial security and maintain the agreement's original intent. Luis appreciates Evan's support and looks forward to his response, highlighting the confidential nature of their communication and providing his contact details for further discussion.
